core-identity.label: Core Identity
core-identity.description: Required details used to identify and classify the coin.
core-identity.tip: Use the official catalogue title and accurate country, year, denomination, and coin type.

images.label: Images
images.description: Obverse, reverse, and optional gallery photographs.
images.tip: Existing images remain unchanged unless you replace or remove them. JPG, PNG, or WEBP up to 5MB each.

mint-information.label: Mint Information
mint-information.description: Single mint mark or multi-mint variant details.
mint-information.tip: Enable mint variants when the same issue was struck at multiple mints with distinct marks.

specifications.label: Specifications
specifications.tip: Include weight, diameter, and quality when known — these enrich catalogue search and comparison.

descriptions.label: Descriptions
descriptions.description: Optional detailed notes for catalogue and collector context.
descriptions.tip: Describe devices, historical context, and collector notes that help reviewers validate the entry.

status-admin.label: Status & Admin
status-admin.description: Catalogue visibility and record status settings.
status-admin.tip: Published catalogue and featured flags control public visibility after approval.

review-submission.label: Review Submission
review-submission.description: Confirm images, details, and recommended fields before submitting.
review-submission.tip: Check for duplicates and missing catalogue details — you can still go back to edit.

adminSeo.subtitle: These metadata fields improve your coin’s discoverability in search engines.
adminSeo.providerBadgeNoneHint: CoinArchive supports Yoast SEO and Rank Math SEO for direct plugin sync.

fallbackDashboard.headline: No compatible SEO plugin detected
fallbackDashboard.intro: CoinArchive can still save these SEO values as fallback metadata, but they will not appear inside Yoast SEO or Rank Math until one of those plugins is active.
fallbackDashboard.supportedHint: Install or activate one of these to unlock full SEO features.
fallbackDashboard.fallbackDesc: Values are stored as CoinArchive fallback metadata and can be migrated or synced later.
fallbackDashboard.fallbackNote: These values will not appear in any SEO plugin panels until a supported plugin is active.
fallbackDashboard.actionDesc: Install or activate Yoast SEO or Rank Math SEO if you want these fields to appear inside an SEO plugin panel.
fallbackDashboard.safeDesc: All generated SEO fields can be stored as CoinArchive fallback metadata and synced later.
fallbackDashboard.howItWorksDesc: Fallback metadata is stored in custom WordPress fields. When you activate Yoast SEO or Rank Math SEO, CoinArchive can sync these values into the plugin.

adminSeo.adminOnlyNoteFallback: Fallback metadata mode — activate Yoast SEO or Rank Math SEO to unlock direct plugin sync.
adminSeo.phaseNoticeSupported: Save SEO to persist {{providerLabel}} fields. Regenerate overwrites local draft only until saved.
adminSeo.phaseNoticeFallback: Save fallback metadata to persist SEO values. Regenerate overwrites local draft only until saved.
adminSeo.fallbackInfoStrip: You can safely continue. Install a supported SEO plugin anytime to migrate and enhance your SEO.
adminSeo.regenerateHint: Overwrite current values with AI draft
adminSeo.saveError: Could not save SEO fields. Please try again.
adminSeo.unsavedChanges: Unsaved SEO changes — save to persist.
adminSeo.inlineSavePromptSupported: SEO changes are not saved to {{providerLabel}} yet.
adminSeo.inlineSavePromptFallback: SEO changes are not saved to fallback metadata yet.
adminSeo.notSavedFallbackPrimary: Not synced to an SEO plugin
adminSeo.notSavedFallbackSecondary: These values are not connected to an SEO plugin.
adminSeo.notSavedFallbackSubtext: Will be stored as CoinArchive fallback metadata because no compatible SEO plugin is active.
adminSeo.draftOverlayTitleFallback: SEO draft can be saved as fallback metadata
adminSeo.draftNeedsReviewDescSupported: Generated SEO data is ready, but it has not been saved to {{providerLabel}} yet. Review the fields and save before approving this coin.
adminSeo.draftOverlayDescFallback: No compatible SEO plugin is active. You can save this SEO draft to CoinArchive fallback metadata now, or activate Yoast SEO / Rank Math SEO to sync directly with an SEO plugin.
adminSeo.applySlugHint: When enabled, saving SEO will overwrite the WordPress post URL slug with the slug above. Leave unchecked to save SEO fields only.
adminSeo.applySlugWarning: URL slug will be updated after saving.
adminSeo.seoTitleHint: Recommended max 60 characters for search results.
adminSeo.seoTitleHelper: Keep titles concise and click-worthy for Google results.
adminSeo.metaDescriptionHelper: Summarize the coin clearly for search snippets.
adminSeo.focusKeyphraseHint: Primary focus phrase for SEO analysis.
adminSeo.slugHelper: This will be used as the URL slug in WordPress if applied later.
adminSeo.previewImageNote: Preview image is based on the current coin image. Social/OG image saving can be added later.
adminSeo.adminNoteLeadSupported: These fields will be mapped to {{providerLabel}} on WordPress:
adminSeo.adminNoteLeadFallback: These values will be stored in CoinArchive fallback meta fields:
adminSeo.adminNoteSupportedSync: Supported direct SEO sync: Yoast SEO, Rank Math SEO
adminSeo.previewDescriptionFallback: Meta description preview will appear here.

title.tooLong: Title is longer than recommended for Google.
title.empty: Add an SEO title to preview search results.

meta.tooShort: Description is shorter than the recommended range.
meta.tooLong: Description may be truncated in search results.
meta.empty: Add a meta description for better click-through.

keyphrase.missing: Add a focus keyphrase for SEO analysis.

slug.needsCleanup: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
slug.empty: Optional, but a slug helps preview the final URL.

tips.title: A good title attracts clicks and improves rankings.
tips.meta: Write unique meta descriptions for each coin.
tips.keyphrase: Use your keyphrase naturally in title and description.
tips.slug: Short, clean URLs are easier to rank.
